title: hydrocotyle peduncularis var. gracilenta
intro: Hydrocotyle peduncularis var. gracilenta, also known as Pennywort or Indian Pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Hydrocotylaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle peduncularis var. gracilenta include improving memory and cognitive function, reducing anxiety and stress, and supporting eye health, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can be found in various forms, including dried leaves and extracts, to promote overall well-being.
